steps.title: Open the appositive
steps.content: The phrase the cellular organs that generate energy from light defines chloroplasts. Because the text already has a dash after light to close that interruption, the blank needs matching punctuation to open it.

steps.title: Match the closing dash
steps.content: Choice A starts the interruption with a comma but ends it with a dash. Choice C gives no punctuation before the interruption. Choice D uses a semicolon, which cannot introduce this nonessential definition. The answer is B.
